method: arxiv abs/ pages, Crossref API, web search for institutional refs

references.cited_as: Lodha et al, Phys. Rev. D 112, 083511 (2025) - DESI DR2 phantom-crossing
references.verified_title: Extended dark energy analysis using DESI DR2 BAO measurements

references.cited_as: Aliberti et al, arXiv:2505.21476 - g-2 White Paper Theory Initiative 2025
references.verified_title: The anomalous magnetic moment of the muon in the Standard Model: an update

references.verified_title: Micrometer-size spatial superpositions for the QGEM protocol via screening and trapping

references.cited_as: Bedroya-Obied-Vafa-Wu, arXiv:2507.03090 - Evolving Dark Sector & Dark Dimension
references.verified_title: Evolving Dark Sector and the Dark Dimension Scenario

references.cited_as: Toomey et al, arXiv:2511.23463 - KMIX, MIT CTP
references.verified_title: Kinetic Mixing and the Phantom Illusion: Axion-Dilaton Quintessence in Light of DESI DR2
Crossed products and quantum reference frames: on the observer-dependence of gravitational entropy
The Club Sandwich: Gapless Phases and Phase Transitions with Non-Invertible Symmetries
references.issue: Narrative may need to add the SciPost reference if a journal venue is implied

references.cited_as: Martinetti arXiv:2603.03216 - twisted/Lorentzian NCG, SM in NCG (frontier 2024-2026)
references.verified_title: Twisted Standard Model and its Krein structure -- in memoriam Manuele Filaci
references.issue: Single-author memoriam tribute; broad topic match (twisted spectral triple SM with Krein-space inner product, ie Lorentzian NCG); not a major milestone paper

references.cited_as: KATRIN Aker et al, Science (2025) DOI 10.1126/science.adq9592 - 0.45 eV, 259 days
references.verified_title: Direct neutrino-mass measurement based on 259 days of KATRIN data

references.cited_as: ATLAS H->mumu arXiv:2507.03595 PRL 135, 231802 (Dec 2025), 5σ upcoming, currently 3.4σ
references.verified_title: Evidence for the dimuon decay of the Higgs boson in pp collisions with the ATLAS detector
issues: PRL vol/page 135/231802 NOT cross-confirmed via direct PRL lookup
5σ upcoming claim is editorial speculation, NOT in paper

references.cited_as: GW250114 LVK arXiv:2509.08099 - strongest GW, Kerr quadrupole percent-level
references.verified_title: Black Hole Spectroscopy and Tests of General Relativity with GW250114

actual_PIs.name: Oriol Romero-Isart
actual_PIs.institution: IQOQI Innsbruck (until 2024); now ICFO Barcelona since May 2024

errors: IFAE/Innsbruck wrong: IFAE is in Barcelona (different institution); Romero-Isart was at IQOQI Innsbruck
Quidant is ETH only, not ETH/ICFO
Award date is 2020, not 2024-2026; if framed as recent, misleading

references.cited_as: Roman Space Telescope target early Sept 2026, NLT May 2027, announce 21 Apr 2026
references.details: NASA Admin Jared Isaacman announced 2026-04-21 at Goddard; Falcon Heavy from KSC LC-39A

references.cited_as: LISA: ESA adoption 25 Jan 2024, launch 2035 Ariane 6, OHB contract 2025
references.details: Adoption 2024-01-25 confirmed; launch 2035 on Ariane 6 confirmed; OHB contract specifically signed June 2025 (precise date better than just 2025)

references.issue: Those numerical values correspond to BAO+CMB ONLY (no SNe). Adding SNe shifts central values to ~(-0.75,-0.86) Pantheon+ or (-0.73,-1.05) DES Y5. Narrative attribution to BAO+CMB+SNe is wrong.

references.cited_as: Gaitsgory-Raskin Geom Langlands - 5 papers arXiv:2405.03599 to 2409.09856

verified_endpoints.title: Proof of the geometric Langlands conjecture I: construction of the functor
Proof of the geometric Langlands conjecture V: the multiplicity one theorem

references.note: Papers II, III, IV exist (5-paper series confirmed by Paper V title); individual middle arXiv IDs not separately re-verified in this pass

references.cited_as: Hartnoll-Yang BKL/automorphic L-functions arXiv:2502.02661 - verbatim quote spot-check
references.verified_title: The Conformal Primon Gas at the End of Time
verified_quotes: the motion of a particle bouncing within half the fundamental domain of the modular group
in a basis of dilatation eigenstates the wavefunction is proportional to the L-function along the critical axis and hence vanishes at the nontrivial zeros

critical_corrections_for_publication: #12 Q-Xtreme: fix institution names (IFAE wrong; Quidant ETH only) and clarify 2020 award date
#16 DESI DR2 numbers: (-0.42, -1.75) is BAO+CMB only, not BAO+CMB+SNe
#7 SymTFT club sandwich: published in SciPost Physics 18, 156 (add citation)
#10 ATLAS H->mumu: '5σ upcoming' is editorial extrapolation not in paper; flag as projection
#8 Martinetti: single-author memoriam tribute, not milestone paper; do not overstate
other_suspicious_claims: #15 LISA OHB: contract signed specifically June 2025 (Thales Alenia/OHB sub-contract is separate)
#5 KMIX significance: 2.5σ vs 3.1σ CPL, >3σ with SNe, 1.7σ with full-shape - which combination is being quoted?
#1 Lodha vs DESI Key Paper II: arXiv 2503.14743 (Lodha) vs 2503.14738 (DESI KP II) - similar IDs, easy to confuse
#17 Gaitsgory-Raskin: middle three arXiv IDs (II, III, IV) not individually re-verified - recommend re-check
